description: Instruction moving from one pipeline stage to another (ID to EX, and EX to WB) should remain the same.
sva: inst_not_changed_id_to_ex: assert property (@(posedge clk) disable iff (rst) idInstValid && idPipeReady |-> ##1 exInstCode == $past(idInstCode));
example_target: ID to EX (example shown); also EX to WB
notes: Two properties: ID->EX and EX->WB. Paper gives ID->EX example only.

description: Instruction that stays within a pipeline stage should remain the same.
notes: Two properties covering different pipeline stages where instruction may stall.

description: ALU flag which influences the control flow should be set correctly for branch instructions: beq, bne, blt, bge, bltu, bgeu.
sva: InstValid && PipeReady && beqOpcode && beqFunct3 && Src1Data == Src2Data |-> equalFlag
example_target: beq (example shown); also bne, blt, bge, bltu, bgeu
notes: One property per branch instruction, six branch types total.
